title: Robinhood Tries Again To Offer US Stock Trading to UK Customers
text: Stock-trading platform Robinhood Markets Inc. (HOOD) on Thursday said it plans its international debut in the U.K. market.

title: Robinhood Expands Trading Platform to the UK
text: Much like its fictional namesake, trading platform Robinhood is now a part of the United Kingdom. The company marked its international debut Thursday (Nov. 30) as it began offering brokerage services to customers in Great Britain, letting them trade more than 6,000 U.S. listed stocks.

title: HOOD Stock Alert: Robinhood Launches in the U.K.
text: Robinhood (NYSE: HOOD ) stock is one of the top-trending tickers on social media and is up on news that it will enable residents of the U.K. to start trading on its platform at the beginning of 2024. This is the first time that the company has entered an overseas market.

title: Robinhood to launch trading platform in the UK
text: Robinhood Markets Inc (NASDAQ:HOOD), the trading app aimed at retail investors, will be launching in the UK. The group's chief executive officer, Vlad Tenev, commended the UK government's initiatives to foster widespread investment.

title: Robinhood opens in Britain with low-cost US trading to woo clients
text: Trading app operator Robinhood Markets Inc. said on Thursday it would roll out brokerage services in Britain, as part of an international expansion plan aimed to "democratise finance" and increase access to markets.

title: Stock trading platform Robinhood to launch in UK after two failed attempts
text: Robinhood hood said Thursday that it's set to launch its platform in the U.K., in the company's third attempt at cracking international expansion.

title: Why Robinhood Wants British Customers
text: Digital brokerages Webull and Public have also launched in the U.K. this year.

title: 2024's Wealth Doublers: 3 Undervalued Growth Stocks to Grab Now
text: Markets are rallying, but not all stocks are sharing in the gains. Several well known securities are struggling right now.

title: Robinhood's Valuation Hits Yearly Low Even As Business Stabilizes
text: Robinhood Markets, Inc.'s Q3 revenues increased by 29% year-over-year, indicating positive growth. The company's financials have stabilized, with over $5 billion in cash and a low valuation. Robinhood's prospects lie in its strategy to redefine financial services, including international expansion and a focus on customer relationships.

title: 7 ‘Turkey' Stocks to Pluck from Your Portfolio BEFORE Thanksgiving
text: Markets are back in the swing of things, as last week's close marked a 7% surge since October's low. Though investors are thankful for these Thanksgiving stocks, you should still trim these turkeys from your portfolio.

title: Cathie Wood Added 1.1 Million Shares of This Fintech After Its 15% Dip. Should You Follow Her Lead?
text: Ark Invest CEO Cathie Wood recently added 1.1 million shares of Robinhood stock. Robinhood dipped following its recent earnings report after reporting another year-over-year decline in monthly active users.

title: Google Is Giving Up on Robinhood (HOOD) Stock
text: Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG , NASDAQ: GOOGL ) sold its remaining stake in Robinhood Markets (NASDAQ: HOOD ), the online brokerage. The search giant had sold nearly 85% of its stake, obtained before Robinhood's initial public offering (IPO), by the end of March.

title: Alphabet Sheds Entire Stake in Trading App Robinhood
text: Google parent Alphabet has sold off all of its shares in trading app Robinhood. The tech giant in August had sold about 90% of its stake in Robinhood, and said in a recent filing with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) that it had dissolved its holdings.

title: Alphabet cuts stock investments in latest quarter as it sold off Robinhood, Lyft holdings
text: Alphabet Inc. GOOGL, +1.80% GOOG, +1.80% disclosed that it managed $1.56 billion worth of equity investments at the end of September, down 16.3% from the end of June, at a time the S&P 500 SPX, +1.56% fell 3.7%. In the internet search behemoth's 13F filing with the Securities in Exchange Commission late Friday, Alphabet disclosed that it sold off its entire holdings of ride-hailing service Lyft Inc. LYFT, +1.79% and trading-app operator Robinhood Markets Inc. HOOD, +3.78% during the latest quarter, after ending June with a $35.5 million investment in Lyft and $6.1 million worth of Robinhood stock.

text: Free trades were largely ushered in by Robinhood, a relatively young brokerage. Much of the discount-broker industry followed along with Robinhood in an effort to protect market share.

title: Why Are Stocks Down Today?
text: Stocks have slipped into the red today after notching their longest winning streak in two years as investor sentiment softens and several prominent companies miss third-quarter earnings estimates. While today's move lower could be a brief pause in a year-end rally, some analysts are wondering if the enthusiasm seen after the Federal Reserve held interest rates steady at the start of November may now be starting to wane.

title: Cooling Trading Activity Pressures Robinhood Stock
text: Robinhood Markets Inc   (NASDAQ:HOOD ) stock was last seen down 13.1% to trade $8.48, after the financial services concern reported a third-quarter revenue miss of $467 million amid slowing trading activity.

text: Shares of digital brokerage Robinhood were falling early Wednesday. Wall Street is skeptical about the company's ability to reverse a trading slump on its platform.

title: Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) Reports Q3 Loss, Lags Revenue Estimates
text: Robinhood Markets, Inc. (HOOD) came out with a quarterly loss of $0.09 per share versus the Zacks Consensus Estimate of a loss of $0.10. This compares to loss of $0.20 per share a year ago.

title: Robinhood (HOOD) Stock Drops 6% Following Q3 2023 Earnings Report
text: Robinhood Markets (NASDAQ: HOOD ) shares dropped 6% in after-hours trading after announcing Q3 earnings on Tuesday, Nov. 7. Though earnings per share (EPS) came in 1 cent better than expected, the California-based financial services company reported revenues of $467 million that missed Wall Street estimates of $478.4 million by 2.4%.

title: Robinhood sees slowdown in trading activity weigh on 3Q revenue
text: Robinhood Markets Inc (NASDAQ:HOOD) reported third quarter revenue that missed Wall Street estimates due to a slowdown in trading activity on its investment platform, sending its sharing falling after Tuesday's closing bell. Shares of Robinhood were down 6.7% at US$9.11 following the release of its financial results.

title: Robinhood sales miss expectations, and stock drops
text: Shares of Robinhood Markets Inc. fell after hours on Tuesday after the trading app reported revenue that missed expectations, as benefits from higher interest rates ran up against a drop in active users and muted trading activity.

title: Robinhood Needs to Grow Up in Order to Save HOOD Stock
text: A “Robinhood (NASDAQ: HOOD ) stock” is one with bad fundamentals small investors buy anyway to squeeze shorts and “get the man.” It's practically a synonym for a trade made by dumb money.
